report: GENESIS V11.2 — AI CREDIT RECOVERY REPORT

phase_5_circuit_breakers.rule: on 5 consecutive gateway failures OR budget breach → state=open (workers must poll before spending credits)

phase_6_budgets.policy: on breach → paused=true + paused_reason logged; workers must SELECT paused BEFORE gateway call

phase_8_projected_savings.quality_impact: ZERO — no gate lowered, no threshold relaxed, only pre-filtering added

phase_9_no_regression_certification.revenue_constitution: compliant — Article: Revenue > Trust > Evidence preserved

compliance.conversion_integrity: ok — savings estimates marked as projections, not attributed revenue
compliance.unified_truth: ok — all metrics sourced from canonical tables

executive_summary: V11 findings revalidated (19,472 credits/7d, 65 pins, 299.6 cred/pin, 2.66% yield). Ranked 7 root causes by weekly credit loss. Deployed 3 tables (budgets, recovery ledger, circuit breakers) with seeded conservative caps and a live /admin/ai-credit-intelligence monitor. Projected safe weekly recovery of 4,168–6,672 credits (21–34% of current spend) with ZERO quality regression. Infrastructure is production-safe; worker integration (V11.3) will activate the pre-brief native filter and headline registry.
